movie.overview: A small-town sheriff in the American West enlists the help of a disabled man, a drunk, and a young gunfighter in his efforts to hold in jail the brother of the local bad guy.
movie.tagline: They fought back to back... No quarter given... No quarter asked... No way in... No way out... of Rio Bravo!
movie.title: Rio Bravo

cast.name: Jack N. Young
cast.character: Gunman Shot by Dude in Saloon (uncredited)
